articles.headline: OpenAI's new GPT-5.4 model powers ChatGPT for Excel with finance-optimized reasoning
articles.description: OpenAI is launching "ChatGPT for Excel," a beta add-in that lets users create, edit, and analyze spreadsheets through natural language. The article OpenAI's new GPT-5.4 model powers ChatGPT for Excel with finance-optimized reasoning appeared first on The Decoder.

articles.headline: Samsung reveals first details of its AI smart glasses to CNBC
articles.description: Samsung's AI smart glasses will be launched in 2026 and will mark the company's first foray into the product category.

articles.headline: Liquid AI Releases LocalCowork Powered By LFM2-24B-A2B to Execute Privacy-First Agent Workflows Locally Via Model Context Protocol (MCP)
articles.description: Liquid AI has released LFM2-24B-A2B, a model optimized for local, low-latency tool dispatch, alongside LocalCowork, an open-source desktop agent application available in their Liquid4All GitHub Cookbook. The release provides a deployable architecture for running enterprise workflows entirely on-device, eliminating API calls and data egress for privacy-sensitive environments. Architecture and Serving Configuration To achieve low-latency execution […] The post Liquid AI Releases LocalCowork Powered By LFM2-24B-A2B to Execute Privacy-First Agent Workflows Locally Via Model Context Protocol (MCP) appeared first on MarkTechPost.

articles.headline: UK arts must not be sacrificed for speculative AI gains, peers say
articles.description: Ministers urged to abandon plans to let tech firms use work of novelists, artists and writers without permissionThe UK’s creative industries must not be sacrificed in the pursuit of speculative gains in AI technology, a House of Lords committee has warned, as the government prepares to reveal the economic cost of proposals to change copyright rules.A report by peers has urged ministers to develop a licensing regime for the use of creative works in AI products and abandon proposals to let tech firms use the work of novelists, artists, writers and journalists without permission. Continue reading...

articles.headline: After Europe, WhatsApp will let rival AI companies offer chatbots in Brazil
articles.description: Meta is now allowing rival AI companies to provide their chatbots on WhatsApp to Brazilian users for a fee, a day after the company confirmed a similar decision for users in Europe.

software_engineering.headline: Liquid AI releases LocalCowork for privacy-first, on-device AI agent workflows
software_engineering.what_changed: Liquid AI released LocalCowork, an open-source desktop agent application, powered by LFM2-24B-A2B, for local AI workflows.
software_engineering.why_care: This enables you to build and deploy AI agents that run entirely on-device, eliminating data egress and enhancing privacy for sensitive applications.
software_engineering.what_to_do: Download LocalCowork from Liquid AI's GitHub Cookbook and experiment with building a privacy-focused AI agent workflow.

software_engineering.headline: UK peers warn against sacrificing arts for speculative AI gains, urge licensing

software_engineering.why_care: Potential copyright changes could impact how you source and use data for training AI models, especially for content generation.
software_engineering.what_to_do: Stay informed on UK copyright law developments and consider ethical data sourcing practices for your AI projects.

cybersecurity.headline: Liquid AI Releases LocalCowork for Privacy-First Agent Workflows
cybersecurity.what_changed: Liquid AI released LFM2-24B-A2B, a model for local tool dispatch, and LocalCowork, an open-source desktop agent application, enabling on-device enterprise workflows without API calls.
cybersecurity.why_care: This allows for privacy-focused AI agent deployment on-device, reducing data egress risks, but requires you to secure the local environment where these agents operate.
cybersecurity.what_to_do: Evaluate LocalCowork's architecture for potential use in your organization's privacy-sensitive workflows and assess its local security requirements this week.

cybersecurity.headline: UK Peers Warn Against Sacrificing Arts for AI Gains, Urge Licensing
cybersecurity.what_changed: A UK House of Lords committee urged ministers to create a licensing regime for AI to use creative works, opposing plans to allow tech firms to use content without permission.
cybersecurity.why_care: While not directly technical, this debate highlights the growing legal and ethical complexities around AI data sourcing, which could impact your organization's compliance and acceptable use policies for AI tools.
cybersecurity.what_to_do: Monitor developments in AI copyright law, especially concerning data training, to ensure your organization's AI usage remains compliant with evolving regulations.

cybersecurity.headline: WhatsApp to Offer Rival AI Chatbots in Brazil After Europe Rollout
cybersecurity.what_changed: Meta will allow rival AI companies to offer their chatbots on WhatsApp to users in Brazil, following a similar decision for European users.

healthcare.why_care: This technology allows you to use AI tools for sensitive patient data analysis and administrative tasks while maintaining strict privacy and avoiding data breaches.
healthcare.what_to_do: Investigate how on-device AI solutions like LocalCowork could enhance data security for your organization's AI initiatives.

healthcare.headline: UK Peers Urge Protection of Arts from Speculative AI Gains
healthcare.what_changed: A UK House of Lords committee urged ministers to develop a licensing regime for AI to use creative works and abandon plans to let tech firms use content without permission.
healthcare.why_care: While not directly healthcare, this debate highlights the broader ethical and legal considerations of AI, which will also impact how AI uses medical data and intellectual property in healthcare.
healthcare.what_to_do: Stay informed about AI copyright and data usage regulations, as these frameworks will influence how AI tools are developed and deployed in healthcare.

healthcare.headline: WhatsApp to Allow Rival AI Chatbots in Brazil After Europe Rollout
healthcare.what_changed: Meta is now allowing rival AI companies to offer their chatbots on WhatsApp to users in Brazil, following a similar decision in Europe.
healthcare.why_care: This expansion means you might soon have access to a wider range of AI-powered communication tools within familiar platforms, potentially improving patient engagement or information sharing.
healthcare.what_to_do: Consider how integrating AI chatbots into secure communication platforms could enhance patient education or appointment management in your practice.

education.headline: OpenAI's GPT-5.4 Powers ChatGPT for Excel, Enhancing Spreadsheet Analysis
education.what_changed: OpenAI launched 'ChatGPT for Excel,' a beta add-in that allows you to create, edit, and analyze spreadsheets using natural language.
education.why_care: This tool can simplify data analysis for tracking grades, managing budgets, or organizing educational resources, making complex tasks more accessible.
education.what_to_do: Explore the beta add-in if available to see how it can streamline your data management tasks in Excel.

education.headline: Samsung to Launch AI Smart Glasses in 2026
education.what_changed: Samsung revealed it will release its first AI smart glasses in 2026.
education.why_care: These smart glasses could offer new ways to deliver interactive lessons, provide augmented reality experiences, or support remote learning in the future.
education.what_to_do: Consider how augmented reality or hands-free computing might integrate into your teaching methods over the next few years.

education.headline: Liquid AI Releases LocalCowork for Privacy-First AI Workflows
education.what_changed: Liquid AI released LocalCowork, an open-source desktop agent application powered by LFM2-24B-A2B, enabling privacy-focused AI workflows directly on your device.
education.why_care: This technology allows you to use AI tools for tasks like content generation or administrative support without sending sensitive student data or proprietary course materials to external servers.
education.what_to_do: Investigate LocalCowork to see if it can help you implement AI tools for your work while maintaining strict data privacy standards.

education.headline: UK Peers Urge Protection for Arts Against Unlicensed AI Use
education.what_changed: A UK House of Lords committee urged ministers to protect creative works from being used by AI without permission and to develop a licensing regime.
education.why_care: This discussion impacts how you can ethically use AI tools for creating educational content, ensuring that original works are respected and properly attributed.
education.what_to_do: Stay informed about copyright laws and AI usage, ensuring you model ethical AI practices when creating or using AI-generated materials in your classroom.

education.headline: WhatsApp to Allow Rival AI Chatbots in Brazil After Europe Rollout
education.what_changed: Meta will now allow rival AI companies to offer their chatbots to WhatsApp users in Brazil, similar to a recent decision for European users.
education.why_care: This expansion means you might soon have access to a wider range of AI-powered assistants directly within a platform many of your students already use, potentially enhancing communication and learning support.
